requirement_topic.en: Children's Nightwear Fire Hazard — ACCC Mandatory Safety Standard / AS/NZS 1249
requirement_topic.zh: 儿童睡衣火灾危险——ACCC强制性安全标准 / AS/NZS 1249
requirement_topic.zht: 兒童睡衣火災危險——ACCC強制性安全標準 / AS/NZS 1249

summary.en: Australia has a mandatory safety standard for children's nightwear and limited daywear that uses AS/NZS 1249 fire-hazard categories, design rules and warning labels. Covered garments include many children's nightwear items and some daywear likely to be used for sleeping. Products must be classified into the correct fire-hazard category based on garment design, fabric and trim, and must carry the required warning or low-fire-danger label. The legal obligation is the Australian mandatory safety standard; AS/NZS 1249 is the referenced technical standard and evidence route.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚对儿童睡衣及有限日间服装设有强制性安全标准，采用AS/NZS 1249的火灾危险类别、设计规则和警示标签。受管产品包括许多儿童睡衣以及可能被用于睡眠的部分日间服装。产品必须根据服装设计、面料和装饰件划入正确的火灾危险类别，并贴附规定的警示或低火灾危险标签。法律义务来自澳大利亚强制性安全标准；AS/NZS 1249为被引用的技术标准和证据路径。
summary.zht: 澳洲對兒童睡衣及有限日間服裝設有強制性安全標準，採用AS/NZS 1249的火災危險類別、設計規則和警示標籤。受管產品包括許多兒童睡衣以及可能被用於睡眠的部分日間服裝。產品必須根據服裝設計、面料和裝飾件劃入正確的火災危險類別，並貼附規定的警示或低火災危險標籤。法律義務來自澳洲強制性安全標準；AS/NZS 1249為被引用的技術標準和證據路徑。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Children's Nightwear and Limited Daywear) Safety Standard under the Australian Consumer Law
AS/NZS 1249 — Children's nightwear and limited daywear having reduced fire hazard

summary.en: China regulates children's textile safety mainly through GB 31701 for infants and children and GB 18401 for general textile safety. These mandatory standards cover chemical and mechanical hazards such as formaldehyde, pH, dyes, cords and small parts. They do not provide the same AS/NZS 1249 fire-hazard category system, Australian warning labels, or garment design classification for children's sleepwear.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 31701管理婴幼儿及儿童纺织产品安全，并通过GB 18401管理一般纺织品安全。这些强制性标准覆盖甲醛、pH值、染料、绳带和小部件等化学及机械风险。它们不提供与AS/NZS 1249相同的火灾危险类别体系、澳大利亚警示标签或儿童睡眠服装设计分类。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 31701管理嬰幼兒及兒童紡織產品安全，並通過GB 18401管理一般紡織品安全。這些強制性標準覆蓋甲醛、pH值、染料、繩帶和小部件等化學及機械風險。它們不提供與AS/NZS 1249相同的火災危險類別體系、澳洲警示標籤或兒童睡眠服裝設計分類。

standards_or_laws: GB 31701-2015 — Safety technical code for textile products used by infants and children (mandatory)
GB 18401-2010 — National general safety technical code for textile products (mandatory)

gap.en: This is a major category-specific gap. A Chinese GB 31701 or GB 18401 report does not establish the Australian fire-hazard category or required label. Exporters need product-by-product AS/NZS 1249 classification, assessment of fabric, trims and garment style, and the correct Australian warning or low-fire-danger label before supply. Misclassification can affect both safety compliance and consumer-law representations.
gap.zh: 这是重要的品类特定差距。中国GB 31701或GB 18401报告不能证明澳大利亚火灾危险类别或所需标签。出口商需要逐款按AS/NZS 1249进行分类，评估面料、装饰件和服装款式，并在供应前贴附正确的澳大利亚警示或低火灾危险标签。分类错误可能同时影响安全合规和消费者法声明。
gap.zht: 這是重要的品類特定差距。中國GB 31701或GB 18401報告不能證明澳洲火災危險類別或所需標籤。出口商需要逐款按AS/NZS 1249進行分類，評估面料、裝飾件和服裝款式，並在供應前貼附正確的澳洲警示或低火災危險標籤。分類錯誤可能同時影響安全合規和消費者法聲明。

target.en: Mandatory — ACCC safety standard under Australian Consumer Law; AS/NZS 1249 is the referenced technical standard for classification and labelling.
target.zh: 强制性——澳大利亚消费者法项下的ACCC安全标准；AS/NZS 1249为分类和标签的被引用技术标准。
target.zht: 強制性——澳洲消費者法項下的ACCC安全標準；AS/NZS 1249為分類和標籤的被引用技術標準。

cn.en: Mandatory chemical and mechanical safety under GB 31701 and GB 18401; no equivalent mandatory AS/NZS 1249 fire-hazard category label.
cn.zh: GB 31701和GB 18401项下化学及机械安全为强制性；没有等同AS/NZS 1249的强制性火灾危险类别标签。
cn.zht: GB 31701和GB 18401項下化學及機械安全為強制性；沒有等同AS/NZS 1249的強制性火災危險類別標籤。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Children's nightwear and limited daywear must meet Australia's mandatory fire-hazard and labelling requirements. Chinese children's textile certificates do not replace AS/NZS 1249 classification and Australian warning-label review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】儿童睡衣及有限日间服装必须满足澳大利亚强制性火灾危险和标签要求。中国儿童纺织品证书不能替代AS/NZS 1249分类及澳大利亚警示标签审核。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】兒童睡衣及有限日間服裝必須滿足澳洲強制性火災危險和標籤要求。中國兒童紡織品證書不能替代AS/NZS 1249分類及澳洲警示標籤審核。
